# JSON-Table

> Turn any JSON into a navigable tree and a sortable, filterable spreadsheet. Local-first, fast, free.

JSON-Table is a browser-based developer utility that renders arbitrary JSON as a two-pane workspace: a formatted tree on the left and a virtualized, filterable grid on the right. Files never leave the browser.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview, features, and paste-to-open entry point.
- [Workspace](/workspace): The interactive JSON tree + table viewer with per-column filters, column reordering, and inline cell editing.
